name: Beyond Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Utility, insurance, grocery, school, property management and government spends

exclusions: Fees and charges (including annual fee and finance charges)
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver subject to Funds Under Management (FUM) criteria in the last 3 months prior to fee levy
additionalBenefits: Complimentary for Standard Chartered Priority or Private Banking relationship clients
Unlimited complimentary domestic and international airport lounge access
4 complimentary guest lounge visits per year
2 complimentary golf games or lessons every month
Buy One Get One free movie ticket offer on BookMyShow (up to ₹1,000 off per month)
25% off on EazyDiner premium dining offers

redemption.ecosystemLabel: 360° Rewards Portal vouchers (1 point = ₹1, no statement cashback)

salaried: Priority or Private Banking relationship with FUM qualification of INR 50 lakhs and above
selfEmployed: Priority or Private Banking relationship with FUM qualification of INR 50 lakhs and above

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-26.

Earns 5 reward points per ₹150 spent on standard retail categories (3.33% return value). 1 point = ₹1 redeemable for vouchers/products via the 360 Rewards Portal only — there is no statement-credit/cashback redemption (₹99 + GST redemption fee).
Earns 3 reward points per ₹150 spent on utility payments, supermarkets, insurance, property management, schools, and government payments (2% return value).
Unlimited domestic and international lounge access is provided for the cardholder, plus 4 complimentary guest visits per year.
Classified as 360° Rewards points (1 point = ₹1 ecosystem value, no statement cashback) on 2026-06-26.
